name_en: Overseas Top-tier Original M80091 Green Three-piece MULTI POCHETTE FÉLICIE
name_cn:
Overseas Top-tier Original M80091 Green Three-piece MULTI POCHETTE FÉLICIE
The main bag can fit the largest iPhone, with an inner compartment and three card slots. The small card bag can be detached and used separately in other bags or hung anywhere. Adjustable wide shoulder strap allows for shoulder, crossbody, and other carrying styles. Perfect combination of practicality and trendiness.
Dimensions: 17x9.6x3.5cm
